sn22.121:1.1: Near Sāvatthī. There the Blessed One said,
sn22.121:1.2: “Monks, I will teach you clingable phenomena & clinging.
sn22.121:1.3: Listen & pay close attention. I will speak.” “As you say, lord,” the monks responded to him.
sn22.121:1.4: The Blessed One said, “And which, monks, are clingable phenomena? Which is the clinging?
sn22.121:1.6: Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the clinging there.
sn22.121:1.7: “Feeling is a clingable phenomenon. Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the clinging there.
sn22.121:1.8: “Perception is a clingable phenomenon. Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the clinging there.
sn22.121:1.9: “Fabrications are clingable phenomena. Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the clinging there.
sn22.121:1.11: Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the clinging there.
sn22.121:1.12: “These are called clingable phenomena. This is the clinging.”
